content: Hi guys, why the module param is not available in upstream ?
Because it has not been upstreamed. I think @Adam Bratschi-Kaye (he) is working on it. But please note that even if the code is submitted, it does not automatically mean it gets merged.
2 messages were moved here from #General > rust-next by Miguel Ojeda.
@Nguyen Dinh Phi, yes I'm working on upstreaming module param support. Is there any particular type you need to use for your module parameters?
I have a quick and dirty rebase of @Adam Bratschi-Kaye (he)s work on top of rust-next here. It seems to work, but I more or less blindly copied code from the rust branch to the rust-next tree.
I also need module parameters for puzzlefs, mainly CStrings
actually what I need is support for mount options, not module parameteres, sorry about that

is this actively being worked on right now?
i've been wanting module param support for something i'm working on. i've been able to get the rust branch version of module params working on rust-dev without much hassle and it seems very good!
there are a few TODOs here and there that i'd be happy to tackle myself but i don't want to duplicate effort if anybody else is working on this right now.

ahhh
very interesting thread!
ty!
sorry didn't quite realise how active the mailing list is >.<
i'll adopt this patch on my own branch and then share some stuff i've been working on
No need to apologize! Glad it helps :)
